offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes delayed payments. We automate anomaly detection and submission instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem: Inaccurate expense reporting leading to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users try anomaly detection for expense reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video for manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in a relevant community
